name: CareRelay OS
description: A 4-agent clinical handoff intelligence system that transforms raw FHIR patient data into verified, safe clinical handoffs using MCP and A2A standards.
author: Samson Ojekunle

agents.name: Context Builder
agents.description: Fetches FHIR data and builds unified patient timeline

agents.name: Risk Intelligence
agents.description: Detects deterioration signals and risk flags

agents.name: Handoff Validation
agents.description: Validates every claim against FHIR source, removes hallucinations

mcp_tools.name: generate_clinical_handoff
mcp_tools.description: Runs full 4-agent pipeline for a patient

mcp_tools.name: get_patient_risk_assessment
mcp_tools.description: Returns risk flags and urgency score
